lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਤੇ ਜਪੀਐ ਨਾਮੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sant kripaa te japeeai naam |1| rahaau |
lines.english: By the Grace of the Saints, one comes to chant the Naam, the Name of the Lord. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ਜਨਮ ਮਰਣ ਤੇ ਛੋਟ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sant prasaad janam maran te chhott |1|
lines.english: By the Grace of the Saints, one is released from birth and death. ||1||
The Blessed Vision of the Saints is the perfect cleansing bath.
By the pleasure of the Saints, the five passions are overpowered,
In the Society of the Saints, egotism is shed,
and the One Lord is seen everywhere. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਜਾ ਕਾ ਪੂਰਾ ਕਰਮ ॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak jaa kaa pooraa karam |
lines.english: Says Nanak, one whose karma is perfect,
touches the feet of the Holy. ||4||46||115||
and the heart is irrigated with the Ambrosial Naam. ||3||
Meditating on the Glories of the Lord, the heart-lotus blossoms radiantly.
Gauree, Fifth Mehl:
Remembering the Lord in meditation, all fears are dispelled. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾ ਮਤਿ ਪੂਰੀ ਜਿਤੁ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: saa mat pooree jit har gun gaavai |
lines.english: Perfect is that intellect, by which the Glorious Praises of the Lord are sung.
In the Saadh Sangat, the treasure of the Name is obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਡੈ ਭਾਗਿ ਸਾਧੂ ਸੰਗੁ ਪਾਵੈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: vaddai bhaag saadhoo sang paavai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: By great good fortune, one finds the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy. ||1||Pause||
By Guru's Grace, one chants the Naam, the Name of the Lord. ||3||
In the Saadh Sangat, all one's works are brought to fruition. ||2||
Through devotion to the Lord, one's life is approved.
within whose heart the Lord God abides. ||4||47||116||
Gauree, Fifth Mehl:
Says Nanak, that humble being is accepted,
They see none other than the Lord of the Universe.
forget to feel jealous of others. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕਸੁ ਸਿਉ ਜਾ ਕਾ ਮਨੁ ਰਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: ekas siau jaa kaa man raataa |
lines.english: Those whose minds are imbued with the One Lord,
The Creator is the Doer, the Cause of causes. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਹਿ ਕਮਾਵੈ ਮੁਖਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਬੋਲੈ ॥
lines.translit: maneh kamaavai mukh har har bolai |
lines.english: Those who work willingly, and chant the Name of the Lord, Har, Har

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਜਨੁ ਇਤ ਉਤ ਕਤਹਿ ਨ ਡੋਲੈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: so jan it ut kateh na ddolai |2|
lines.english: - they do not waver, here or hereafter. ||2||
The Giver of life, the Sovereign Lord King meets them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੈ ਹਰਿ ਧਨੁ ਸੋ ਸਚ ਸਾਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kai har dhan so sach saahu |
lines.english: Those who possess the wealth of the Lord are the true bankers.
The Perfect Guru has established their line of credit. ||3||
The Naam, the Name of the Lord, is the Support of the breath of life of His devotees.
Gauree, Fifth Mehl:
Says Nanak, they attain the supreme status. ||4||48||117||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਜਿਸੁ ਆਪਿ ਦਿਵਾਏ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: kar kirapaa jis aap divaae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The Lord Himself bestows it, in His Mercy. ||1||Pause||
The Naam is their wealth, the Naam is their occupation. ||1||
By the greatness of the Naam, His humble servants are blessed with glory.
Attuned to the Naam, His devotees are approved. ||2||
The Naam is the home of peace of His devotees.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਨ ਕਉ ਧਾਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: har kaa naam jan kau dhaarai |
lines.english: The Name of the Lord is the support of His humble servants.
Says Nanak, those who have perfect destiny

lines.translit: naam sang taa kaa man laag |4|49|118|
lines.english: - their minds are attached to the Naam. ||4||49||118||
With each and every breath, they remember the Naam. ||3||
Gauree, Fifth Mehl:
Since then, my restless mind has been satisfied. ||1||
By the Grace of the Saints, I meditated on the Name of the Lord.
I have obtained the home of peace, singing His Glorious Praises.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸ੍ਰਮੁ ਮਿਟਿਆ ਮੇਰੀ ਹਤੀ ਬਲਾਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sram mittiaa meree hatee balaae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: My troubles have ended, and the demon has been destroyed. ||1||Pause||
Worship and adore the Lotus Feet of the Lord God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਸਿਮਰਨ ਤੇ ਮਿਟੀ ਮੇਰੀ ਚਿੰਤਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: har simaran te mittee meree chintaa |2|
lines.english: Meditating in remembrance on the Lord, my anxiety has come to an end. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਤਜਿ ਅਨਾਥੁ ਏਕ ਸਰਣਿ ਆਇਓ ॥
lines.translit: sabh taj anaath ek saran aaeo |
lines.english: I have renounced all - I am an orphan. I have come to the Sanctuary of the One Lord.
The Creator Lord abides in Nanak's mind. ||4||50||119||
Since then, I have found the highest celestial home. ||3||
My pains, troubles, doubts and fears are gone.
Gauree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰ ਕਰਿ ਟਹਲ ਰਸਨਾ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵਉ ॥
lines.translit: kar kar ttehal rasanaa gun gaavau |
lines.english: With my hands I do His work; with my tongue I sing His Glorious Praises.
